title: agrostis gunniana
intro: Agrostis gunniana, also known as Tasmanian bent-grass, is a species of grass native to the island of Tasmania in Australia. The medicinal properties of Agrostis gunniana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Agrostis gunniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for topical application, and its leaves and flowers can be used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
